name: Files in Sensitive File Directories
notes: This rule detects when a new file is found in a sensitive file directory and then adds the file name to the Files in Sensitive Directories reference set as a Rule response.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Deleted Events
when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
when any of File Directory (custom) are contained in any of Sensitive File Directories - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY Files in Sensitive File Directories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Deleted Events
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
AND when any of File Directory (custom) are contained in any of Sensitive File Directories - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Add the "Filename" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Files in Sensitive Directories"
